content.en:
Immediately, Ye Tian paid some points and got the opportunity to compete for the place.

Of course, many half-step Sevenfold Ancestors knew that they had no hope, so they didn't waste their points.

After a long time, the registration deadline was closed.

This time, Xuanyu Pavilion had a total of more than 60,000 half-step sevenfold ancestors to sign up, and they were all top half-step sevenfold ancestors, and they all had confidence in themselves, otherwise they would not have signed up.

And so many half-step sevenfold ancestors signed up, and in the end, only about 3,000 people could get a place, so you can imagine how fierce the competition is.

Subsequently, these half-step sevenfold ancestors of the Xuanyu Pavilion competed with each other, and they were under the care of the sevenfold ancestors, so it was unlikely that they would fall.

Soon, the challenge began.

Xuanyu Tower.

A half-step sevenfold ancestor entered it and learned from each other one-on-one.

And Ye Tian fought with one opponent after another, and they all easily defeated each other.

After all, with his current strength, unless he encounters a half-step sevenfold ancestor who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, a half-step sevenfold ancestor who has only comprehended the Eightfold Yuan Dao or the Sevenfold Origin Dao, even if he breaks the boundary dozens of times, he is not his opponent!

After more than 100 battles, Ye Tian directly locked a place, and the whole process was very easy.

......

"All the competitions are over, the quota has been decided, and you should be about to enter the 13th Nest!"

Ye Tian waited silently, and finally after waiting for dozens of Origin Domain Eras, the notice from the top level of the Xuanyu Pavilion was issued.

Ten days later, the 13th Ancient Lair was officially entered.

And each half-step sevenfold ancestor who has obtained the quota has obtained a key, through which he can directly shuttle into the No. 13 Ancient Nest.

Ten days of origin passed quickly.

this day.

The high-level leaders of the Star Ancient Giant City joined forces to activate the formation, and the original antiquities that were intercepted were consumed and connected to the hidden No. 13 Ancient Nest.

The No. 13 Ancient Nest was too deeply hidden, even the Sevenfold Peak Ancestor couldn't detect it, and only the half-step Eightfold Ancestor could sense it at a special time.

At this time, under the influx of a large number of primordial antiquities, the walls of this No. 13 ancient nest were relaxed.

"Let those half-step sevenfold ancestors go in!"

The city lord of the Star Ancient Giant City, Heiya Dao Ancestor spoke.

Soon, countless half-step sevenfold ancestors in the Hanhai District Boundary all got the news.

Then, a half-step sevenfold ancestor who had obtained a quota urged the key in his hand.

Even if they were no longer the half-step Sevenfold Ancestors of the Star Ancient Giant City, they could also enter the No. 13 Ancient Lair through the token at this moment, so they didn't know that the entrance to the No. 13 Ancient Lair was in the Star Ancient Giant City.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian urged the key, and his body was sucked by a force, and he passed through some kind of barrier in the dark.

......

"This is the 13th Nest!"

Ye Tian stood in the void of the No. 13 Ancient Nest, vigilant all around.

At this moment, the 13th Ancient Nest has suppressed him, but the suppression is not too great.

Moreover, as soon as he entered, he sensed the breath of many primordial antiquities.

According to the information given by the Xuanyu Pavilion, although the No. 13 Ancient Nest has primordial artifacts comparable to the Sevenfold Ancestor level, the number is extremely rare, and almost all of them are in a state of sleep during this period, which is imperceptible, as if they do not exist inside the Ancient Nest.

As long as you don't provoke them, they don't exist.

As for how to identify if there are such primordial artifacts there, the method is simple, and that is to use a secret art.

Ye Tian had already cultivated this secret technique, the Ancient Occult Technique!

The ancient occult art is practiced by combining the power of the Yuan Dao with the objects of the primordial antiquities, for example, he obtains the items in the ancient objects in the distance, and those items can be used as a medium to cultivate the ancient occult arts.

With the Ancient Occult Arts, if you sense that there is a terrifying primordial artifact hidden in a certain place, then don't go there.

Of course.

Ye Tian not only had to guard against the primordial artifacts here, but also had to guard against other half-step sevenfold ancestors, after all, there were quite a few half-step sevenfold ancestors who fell here every time, and many of them were killed by other half-step sevenfold ancestors.

Soon, dozens of primordial artifacts surrounded Ye Tian.

These primordial artifacts weren't powerful, they were just primordial artifacts comparable to the Sixfold Primordial Ancestors.

Ye Tian waved his hand and directly killed them.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to look for resources and treasures, after all, after coming to this trip, he naturally had to gain more!

Soon, Ye Tian found something good.

"This is the Purple Xuanguang Stone!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised when he saw a large piece of purple Xuanguang stone in front of him.

Because there are too many of these purple Xuanguang stones!

And the Purple Xuanguang Stone is similar to the Purple Xuanguang Light, it is an auxiliary thing that can assist the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor to break through to the Sixfold Ancestor, and the effect is even better.

With so many Purple Xuanguang Stones, it is enough to cultivate a large number of Dao Ancestors!

If it was in the realm of the primeval plains, it would be extremely difficult to find a treasure similar to the Purple Xuanguang Stone, but I didn't expect that there were so many here.

"This piece has at least tens of millions of purple Xuanguang stones!"

Ye Tian immediately went over and collected these Purple Xuanguang Stones.

Although these purple Xuanguang stones are of no use to him, they can be left to the human race or traded, and they can be exchanged for a large amount of resources!

Therefore, Ye Tian has made a lot of money this time!

"It's a good deal, although it took a lot of points to get this spot, but this wave has earned it back, and even far exceeded. No wonder they all want to enter the 13th Ancient Live, there are too many resources here!"

Immediately, Ye Tian went to other places, and he also gained a lot, and even found a lot of treasures that would help him cultivate.

Thundered!!!

In the distance, there are battle fluctuations.

At this time, Ye Tian received a summons from a Dao Ancestor, which was from a Dao Ancestor in the Xuanyu Pavilion.

In fact, for this kind of communication, unless it is a good relationship, other Dao Ancestors will not save it.

But Ye Tian thought about it and passed.

After all, to be able to let these Dao Ancestors fight, it must be that they have discovered good things, and in the case of saving people, they can get some benefits by the way, why not do it!

Of course, if the enemy is too strong for him to beat, then he will not attack.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to this area, and finally knew what they were fighting for.

"It turned out to be the original antiquity-purple-blooded elf!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

This is an extremely rare primordial artifact, and the appearance of the purple blood elf is similar to that of an elf, killing the purple blood elf can obtain the purple blood golden chalcedony in its body, this purple blood golden chalcedony helps the half-step sevenfold original ancestor break through to the sevenfold original ancestor.

After the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor broke through the boundary of the Nine Times and comprehended a top-notch Yuan Dao control technique, he could go to the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm.

However, even if a Dao Ancestor who has comprehended the Eightfold Yuan Dao and attacks the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, the probability of success is only one in tenth, and after failing once, the probability of the future will be lower and lower.

Therefore, these half-step sevenfold ancestors all want to obtain some auxiliary treasures to increase the success rate.

And the Purple Blood Golden Essence can increase the success rate of breaking through the Sevenfold Ancestor, and if there are enough Purple Blood Golden Pulp, it can increase the chance of thirty percent.

The purple blood golden pith in the body of this purple blood elf is not much, but they also want it, even if it is only the purple blood golden pith in the body of this purple blood elf, it is enough for a half-step sevenfold ancestor to increase the chance of being above one percent.

For this reason, they fought frantically.

And this purple-blooded elf was covered by a treasure, and it couldn't escape from here, just waiting for these half-step sevenfold ancestors to divide the victory and defeat, it would die.
